T0415.title: Loan Bro
T0415.definition: In black-market fraud, a professional loan fraudster who maliciously defaults after borrowing.
T0415.description: Operating with a 'borrowing is earning' mentality, these individuals specifically target online lending platforms with lax risk controls. They are active in various communities, sharing tips on evading debt collection, delaying repayment, and identifying which platforms are easiest to borrow from. Their actions directly cause platform default rates to soar, making them a primary target for anti-fraud systems.
T0415.usageExample: Guys, I applied for a collection suspension via online customer service, finally got transferred to a human to request it, but the agent ignored me and stopped replying. What's going on? Has anyone who got a suspension teach me what to say?
